title: RiverReeds
description: RiverReeds is a Vanilla+ mod which adds Cattails to world generation and thatch for building
body:
![Cattails in a swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/079b39680b8506a3cbbda8f956b16a5194f1acd1.jpeg) ## ✨ Features - **Cattails** naturally generate in **swamps, rivers, and forests** - Harvest cattails to obtain **Cattails** and **Cattail Seeds** - Seeds can be planted in **1-block deep water** to grow cattails **anywhere** - Craft cattails into: - **Reeds** (resource item) - **Brown Dye** - **Thatch Blocks** (with slab & stair variants) ## 🛠️ Crafting ### Reed
### Dried Reed Dry in a furnace, like when drying kelp ### Thatch
### Thatch Stairs / Slabs Use the standard recipe for stairs and slabs ## 📦 Installation 1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). 2. Download the latest release of **RiverReeds**. 3. Place the `.jar` file into your Minecraft `mods` folder.
